titleStmt.title: SII 35.116: original edition by D. M. Nagaraju
No. 116. (A.R. No. 24 of 1950-51.) BOMBAY, BOMBAY DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription refers to the reign of Sāḷuva-Nāyaka and is dated Śaka 1485, Dundubhi, Chaitra śu. 12, Monday, Magha corresponding to A.D. 1562, March 16, f.d.t. 76, f.d.n. 74.

It records the construction of a shrine at Gerasoppe by the chief Sāḷuva-Nāyaka, son of Bemmarasi-Nāyikiti and Viṭṭappa-Nāyaka, and the consecreation of Śānti-Tīrthaṅkara therein and records gifts of lands made to the same by the chief. It also refers to the rule of the queen Chenna Bhairādēvi over the provinces of Nagire, Haive, Tuḷu and Koṅkaṇa on the west coast. Reviewed in ASR for 1924-25, p. 115.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmatparamagaṁbhīrasyādvādāmōghalāṁchanaṁ jīyātrailōkyanāthasya śāsanaṁ jinaśāsanaṁ .
Asti kōravadēśēsminnagarī nagarītica tatrānēkamahīmahījātā śītāṁśuvaṁśajāḥ . tatsaṁtānēnēbhasama śubhagāpā
calāṁbā manōjña śrīdēvēṁdrādhipati mithunē caṁnabhairāṁbikāyāṁ . bhallātavyāṁ purī śaśikalāsaṁnibhā dha¨rmmavā¨rdhē
yāsāṁ rakṣatyamalanagarīmukhyarājyaṁ supūjyaṁ tatpādapadmōpajīvi nagarī siṁhāsanēśānvaya janita mahānupadēvēṁdra mānyaḥ svaguṇavrāta
daihika parasadbaṁdhu mitrānuṣaṁgaḥ jagati sannāyakāgrēsarapaṭubhaṭasadviṭṭapakhyātma jāta śubhagaḥ śrī sāḷuvākhyaḥ svavevirahitarata sādhujīyānmanōjñaḥ [.]
yisōdidaradaḍḍikaraḷuvē pū¨rṇṇagoḷa nāḍādiganeṁba cāṭu bhaṭaṁ kōṭiśiraḥ kavacaṁgaḷeyda maigūḍada munna paṭu paṟeyappine gaṁkāva
roḷa kōḷūdahanuṁ peṟūtivūḷaguḷa bhaṭa¨rkaḷoḷāvanādoḍaṁ . baiharoḷagudayisida sōdaramāvaṁ mahānubhāvaṁ rāmaṁnā
riyanāyakanādaṁdevitara baḷige bhūṣaṇamene tāṁ . Ātaṁgaḷiya sāḷuvanītaṁ nāyaka suratnanenipaṁ tanagiṁtātaṁ viṭṭapanāyakanātaṁ nagari surā
jyanṛpa suprītaṁ . haḷadipuradoḷage bīdiyabaḷige nabhōmaṇiya māḷkiyiṁ pesa¨rvaḍedā viḷasadviṭṭhapanāykaniḷegesevaṁgātmajāta sāḷuva nī
taṁ . yiṁtappa sāḷuvanāyakaṁ Ācaṁdrā¨rka mahīdhara niścalaghanasphū¨rjaccilāni¨rmmatā dinōkta viśiṣṭalakṣaṇamahāsthaṁbhōllasaṁtprastaraṁ . muktaśrī
vanitāvivāhavilasanmāṁgalyagēhōpamaṁ viśvāsīcanakaṁ vidāpuvilasaccaitālayaṁ bha taḥ . śrī tatra śrī śāṁtināthā¨rkkaṁ jaganmitraṁtamōnudaṁ sāḷu
vākhyasatāṁ mukhyaḥ prativāpitavānsudhīḥ tatpādamūlasannityanaimittikamahōtsava . kṣētraṁ sādhuvitī¨ryā sāḷuvō jayati sphuṭaṁ . svasti
śrīmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvara sāḷuva caṁnnabhairādēvi Aṁmanavarū nagarirājya haive tuḷa koṁkaṇa muṁtāda rājyavanū pratipālisutaṁ Iddaṁdina śālivāhana saka
va¨rṣa 1485 ya duṁdubhisaṁvatsara caitra śu 10 caṁdravāra maghānakṣatra śubhalagnadalu śrīmatu haḷadipuradali hujjarabaṁḍiya baḷiya viṭṭappanāyka
bhairava hujjara dēUtara baḷi taṁgi beṁmarsināykati viṭṭappanāyka baṁmarsināṁykatiyavarige puṭṭida sāmaṁta
cūḍāmaṇiyāda sāḷuva ya catu¨rbhujada bastiya pū¨rvvadiśābhāgada mukhavāgi caityālayavanu kaṭṭisi
śāṁtitī¨rtthaṁkaranūnaṁ pratiṣṭheyanu dalli nanna hesarali naṁma nitya naimittika muṁtāda dha¨rmmakke biṭṭukoṭṭa vṛttigaḷa śilāśāsanada bhāṣākra
maveṁteṁdare kūṇakaḷi teṟava kuḷiyāḷagaṇa haṇa dake naṁma taṁdeya makkaḷu daivarasi ciṁmarasa saha prāku Arasugaḷalli mūlava koṁḍu sirahasigeya
liha kūṁḍanāthana pramāṇina navage pedabhāgiya teṟanū Arasugaḷa kayya kuḷamūlavanu koṁḍu yī dha¨rmakke biḍu dēvasva śāsanāṁkitavāgi biṭṭu koṭṭa sthaḷaṁga
ḷavivara maraḷiyagadde muḍe 2 hiriya baṁkadali Adake baṁda bāgiya Aḍiya haraḷagadde mu 1 Araṇiya kaṁḍa bānalli saṁda gadde mu 1 mattaṁ Araṇiya kaṁḍa bāna mē
le 80 vaḷi mu 1 lli kaṇikaḍahina yeli paṭṭiya gadde mu 1 mayaduramāḍaṇakke mu 1 valavina mugaḷiyalli gadde mu 1 Aḍiya kaṁḍa gadde mu 1 Aṁtū suggigadde mūḍe hannoṁ
danū [I]dakke baṁda mareya gadde saha yivakke baṁda mane mane tāṇa teṁginahittilu meluneya¨rvvoṁgoṁḍu sahavāda samasta kṣattiyellavanū kaṭṭisida bastiya śāṁtitī¨rtthaṁ
ranātha mūladalli naṁna hesarali naḍeva nitya naimittikada dha¨rmakke naṁna trikaraṇa śuddhiyiṁ hiraṇyōdaka dhārāpū¨rvakamācaṁdrā¨rkkasthāyiyāgi dha¨rmakke biṭu
koṭṭanu Ī dha¨rmakke biṭṭu koṭṭa vṛttigaḷiṁda varuṣa 1 kke kaṭṭi bahagēṇibhatta pereya mū 140 Ā teṁginahittiliṁ baha Ivakke naḍasuva dha¨rmma dēvara
Amṛtapaḍige varuśa . 1 kke bhta (bhatta) periya 45 Akṣatege bhta (bhatta) mu 15 yeraḍu hottina kṣīrābhiṣēkakke bhta ma 24 bha Aḍake yali gaṁdha dhūpakke bhta
mu 12 A hnika 3 kke bhta mu 23 Aṁtu bhta pereyanū nālvattakkeṟu bareda pramāṇina dha¨rmava māḍi caityālayadiṁdrare nōḍi naḍesi baharu mattaṁ ppā
ṇiṁya vūḷage taṁda mudināyana kaiyalli mūlava koṁḍāḷutaṁ Idda sādhana pramāṇina suḷiya gūḷiya gadde hāne
Idakke baṁda kaṇaliya gadde hāne 10 gadde mūḷa hāne 5 kke kaṭṭida gēṇi bha piriya mu 25 kke Ā nāgarsi Ākeya taṁma jaṭṭeyaṇṇana vi
śāṁtitī[¨rttaṁ]kara bha pere mū 20 dīvigeya yaṁṇege bha mū 1 Adakke baṁda mane teṁginahittiliṁda kaḍida kāyi 160 yī vṛttigaḷanu ka
mūlavāgi koṁḍu yī hola yī dha¨rmmakkū śāsanāṁkitavāgi biṭṭu koṭṭinu nāykana magaḷu
yōja vaḷiya ge mūlava koṁḍu jōgiya maṇucina kaṇiveya gadde nālkakke saṁbhāra gadde mu voṁdakke kajjada gēṇiya bhta pere mū 12 yī
raḍu mūḍe bhta danīḷavanu sthaḷamūla kuḷamūlava koṁḍu namma māva sāḷuvanāykara bastiya śāṁtitī¨rtthaṁkara pādamūladali naṁna hesarali nitya naḍeva
dhāreya dha¨rmakke nānū naṁna trikaraṇa śudhiyiṁda dha¨rmakke biṭṭu koṭṭenu mattaṁviṭappanāykara maga liṁgaheggaḍeyā kāvagoḷage mūlava koṁḍāḷutta Idu
giya mūvatu mūḍe bhtada sthalaṁgaḷanu kuḷamūḷava koṁḍu naṁma Aṇṇa sāḷuva nāykaṁ bastiya śāṁtitī¨rtthaṁkara pādamūladali naṁna tāyi bīrananāyka
caṁmarasināykatiyavara hesarali hāladhāreya dha¨rmakke nānunaṁnatrikaraṇaśuddhiyiṁda dha¨rmakke biṭṭu koṭṭenu mattaṁ sāḷuvanāykara
gāroḷage sthaḷamūla kulamūlava koḍuva sādhana pramāṇa māḍi bhtada sthalaṁgaḷuAdakke baṁda samasta vṛttiyanu nānu kaṭṭisida bastiya śāṁ
tī¨rtthaṁkarige nāgiyabe marsināykarige paṁcamiya haṁnneraḍaṟalli naḍeva paṁcāmratābhiṣēkada dha¨rmakke nānu nanna trikaraṇa śuddhiyiṁ
dēva ke koṭṭa biṭṭu koṭṭa mattaṁ mācaṇanāya nāykanu ḷiya voḷage tānu mūlavāgi terumānyavāgi muḍe gaddeya nela
mane lliyā dha¨rmakke luvanu tegedukoṁḍu yī dōṁṭayā gaddeya nelavannu sāḷuvanāykara bastiya śāṁtitī¨rtthaṁkara pādamūladalli A
hasara hāladhāreya dha¨rmakke Ācaṁdrā¨rkkasthāyiyāgi biṭṭukoṭṭa viṭṭapanāykara maga liṁgaheggaḍeya ma yalli haḍavina [sa¨rvvasva]
voḷage nālku mūḍe Akkiya sthaḷaṁgaḷanu namma Aṇṇa sāḷuvanāyakaru kaṭṭisida bastiya śāṁtitī¨rtthaṁkara pādamūladalli naṁma taṁde viṭappanāykara hesa
ralli nīvu paḍeva hāladhāreya dha¨rmakke teṟu mānyavāgi nannatrikaraṇaśuddhiyiṁ dha¨rmakke biṭṭu koṭṭenu mattaṁ kaṁṭhiya beṇaseṭṭiya makkaḷu saṁṇayavīra
na caṁmayanavaru sāḷuvanāyakaru kaṭṭisida bastiya śāṁtitī¨rtthaṁkara pādamūladalliniṁtu hiriya taṁde boṁmaṇaseṭṭiya hesarinalli nitya naḍeva hāladhāreya
kkegaḷavaṁ ya voḷage [Ā] boṁmalaseṭṭiya Arakeyiṁ baṁdagaḷa vaṁkeyalli nāṭamūlavāgi Āḷuttaṁ yida sthaḷaṁgaḷa mēle 12 mūḍhe bhtavanu
māṭeyiṁna caṁdrā¨rkkasthāyiyāgi biṭṭu bahevu yeṁdu barasida dha¨rmmaśāsana mattaṁ sāḷuvanāyakanu [Ā]hāradhānadha¨rmakke biṭṭu
koṭṭa sthaḷaṁgaḷa vivara pāḍa holadoḷage Aruma siriyāralli kaṇanuṁ kallappanāykara makkaḷu hiriya dēvarāya Avana taṁgi to
yavara kaiyalli mūlava koṁḍu Āhāradānakke biṭṭu koṭṭa Aḍiya sareya sthaḷaṁgaḷige gaḍi mūḍalu Aḍakeya kuḷiya hegaḍeya vṛttiya hāḷi
teṁkalu nīreṟakavoḷagāgi yikkida kallu gaḍi paḍuvalu mīḷiya māgiya ḍana vṛttiyalli Ikkida kallu gaḍibaḍagalu heṟavaḍiya kēsavana vṛttiya kallu
hoḷegaḍi Iṁtī nālku gaḍiyiṁ voḷagana sugimakke gademū 4 mattaṁ papāpatiya gade mū 1 sāviya gade mū 1 yige makka saha mū
ḍe gade Idake baṁda sa¨rvvāṁgōḍu sahavāda samasta vṛtti yellada hāmaṁdu [haḍavala¨rttha] vanū koṭṭu mūlavanokkoṁḍu sa¨rvabādapa
rihārā¨rtavāgi Arasugaḷa vyaya kuḷamūlava māḍikoṁḍu Ī dha¨rmakke biṭṭu koṭṭa sthaḷaṁgaḷige kaṭṭida gēṇi bhta mū 70 yeppattu mūḍe bhta sthalagaḷa madēva
śāsanāṁkitavāgi nānu kaṭṭisida śāṁtitī¨rtthaṁkara bastiyalli 20 voṁdu raḍa tapasvigaḷāhāradāna dha¨rmakke nānu naṁna trikaraṇaśuddhiyāgi biṭṭu koṭṭa dha¨rmastaḷaṁgaḷa vivara
saliyoḷage se ṇaseṭṭiya boṁmaṇiseṭṭiya kayyalli nānu mūlava māḍikoṁḍa dha¨rmmastaḷaṁgaḷa mu gadibījava mā
na gaddeya sthaḷa mūṟu mūḍe bayaḷana gadde staḷa 1 mūḍeya 20 hāne Ubhayaṁ 4 mūḍeya 20 hāne gareya sthaḷaṁgaḷu I
ne baṁda mane manedāri nīrudāri sa¨rvvāṁgūḍusahavāda samasta vṛttiyellavanu sāḷuvanāyakara bastiya śāṁtitī¨rtthaṁkara
pādamūladalli naḍeva dha¨rmakku bhaṁḍārigaḷa dha¨rmakkū Ācaṁdrā¨rkkasthāyiyāgi biḍu dēvasva śāsanāṁkitavāgi sāḷuvanāyaka
dumarasināyakatiyavaru tāvu tamma trikaraṇaśuddhiyiṁda yī dha¨rmma biṭṭu koṭṭaru yī biṭṭu koṭṭa dha¨rmasthalaṁga
kaṭṭida gēṇi bhatta pereya 60 mūḍe bhatta Ī bhattakke Ā bastiya Iṁdraru naḍesuva dha¨rmada vivara bastiya bāḍā gaḷi
laṁ pratiyalli 30 mūḍe bhattavanu koṭṭu baharu dasa kṣaṇada hattu dinada dha¨rmmakke mūḍe bhattavanu tegedu ko
Ā bastiya Iṁdraru caṁnabhairādēviAṁmanavaru kuḷamūlavāgi biṭṭu koṭṭa dha¨rmmanārana pramāṇiya Ā beḷiya hadi
nāṟu haṇavige Avara hesara hāladhāreya dha¨rmavanu Ā bastiya Iṁdrare Ācaṁdrā¨rkkavāgi naḍesi baharu yeṁdu barasida dha¨rma
śāsana mattaṁ jaṁṭukanāyakana maga narasaṇanāyakanu volagaḷiyoḷage pra hālotteyāgi Āḷuttaṁ Idu teṁ
melaṟamūlagaḷāda vīraṇanāykana voḍa huṭṭidaḷāda dēvarasināykatiya kayalli teṟumānyavāgi Ācaṁdrā¨rkkasthā
yiyāgi dha¨rmava biḍuva nānu Anuguṇavāgi mūlava māḍikoṁḍu dha¨rmmakke biṭṭu koṭṭa dha¨rmasthalaṁgaḷa vivara savalagaddeya
1 mattaṁ baṁga gaddeya sthala 3 mattu 3 mattaṁ hēriya gaddeya sthaḷa samānavoṁda[¨rttha] mattaṁ sāreya gaḍi gaddeya sthala samāna voṁda[¨rttha]
sthalaṁgaḷu sabaraha sthalaṁgaḷige baṁda mane ṭhāUnu taṁmaṇaseṭṭiya gaḍiya paḍuva diśābhāgada mane ṭhā sahasa¨rvvāṁga
salāvāda samasta vṛttiyellavanu biḍu dēvasva śāsanāṁkitavāgi sāḷuvanāyakara bastiya śāṁtitī¨rtthaṁkara
mūladali na hesarali naḍeva hāladhāreya dha¨rma paṁcakalyāṇada dha¨rmma nānu naṁga trikaraṇaśuddhiyiṁda dha¨rmakke bi
ṭṭu koṭṭenu Ī biṭṭu koṭṭa sthaḷaṁgaḷige kaṭṭida gēṇi varuṣa 1 kke bhatta hoṟa . 14 . Akṣaradalli hadinālkuvare hoṁda
bhattakke naḍesuva dha¨rmada vivara nanna hesaralu naḍeva hāladhāreya dha¨rmakke bhatta ho 5 . paṁca kalyāṇada dha¨rmakke bha
tta hore vubhayaṁ 14 . bhattavanu Ā bastiya Iṁdrarē taṁma hesara nu koṭṭu tegedu koṁḍu dha¨rmavanu Ācaṁdrā¨rkka
sthāyiyāgi naḍesi baharu yeṁdu narasaṇanāyakanu biṭṭu koṭṭa dha¨rmma bīrakanāykati caṁmarasi naṁjiya
boṁmaṇaseṭṭi bhairasināykati dēvarasiyavarū hāladhāreya dha¨rmmakke biṭṭu koṭṭa nādana pramāṇina sāliṁgaḷi
baha bhattavanu [Ī] bastiya Iṁdraru tegedukoṁḍu Ī śāṁtīśvararige Aṣṭami catu¨rdaśigaḷalli ge 1 kke bhadeya 1 vivara
dalli laṁbā tā tavanū Ācaṁdrā¨rkkasthāyiyāgi nirisi baharu Arasanāyakara bha taṁmiyā
sida sāsanada vivara nānu ṟikeya voḷage mūlavāgi Āḷutta Idda pramāṇina tūbina gadde kūḷaguṁḍi gadde
sa gadde saṁ muḍagana gadde Ava baṁ kaṇi muni munisahāyeṁṭu mūḍe gaddeyivake baṁda teṁginahittilu saha
samasta vṛttiyallavanu sāḷuvanāyakaru bastiyalu Iha jana munigaḷavoṁdu dēvasva
kitavāgi narana trikaraṇaśuddhiyiṁda biṭṭu koṭṭenu sāḷuvanāyakara makkaḷu bairarasiyavaru
na naṁma taṁde sāḷuvanāykaru tamage māḍikoṭṭa sā si pramāṇina A¨rtthavṛtti Iṁda sāḷuva nāyka
bastiya jī¨rṇnōddhārakke va¨rṣa 1 kke varāha Eraḍu Ā bastiya riya grāsakke tereya Ippattu mūḍe bhatta
yalu Ācaṁdrā¨rkkasthāyiyāgi naṁma saṁtati paraṁpareyāgi koṭṭu yaṁdu mi bhairarasiya
śrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 35.116 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
